hero.headline: Crafting Digital Realities
hero.subheadline: Immersive 3D product visualizations and animations that push the boundaries of digital storytelling

scrollSections.title: Every Polygon Tells a Story
scrollSections.text: From concept to photorealistic render — we obsess over every detail to deliver visuals that captivate and convert.

scrollSections.title: Built for the Future
scrollSections.text: Leveraging Blender, Cycles, and EEVEE to create assets that work across film, games, AR, and the web.

aboutPreview.headline: Where Art Meets Technology
aboutPreview.description: Specializing in photorealistic product visualization and cinematic animation using Blender. Every project is a meticulous blend of artistic vision and technical precision.

about.headline: The Story Behind the Pixels
about.description: A passionate 3D artist turning imagination into photorealistic reality. Specializing in product visualization, motion design, and interactive web experiences.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: Every render should evoke emotion. I believe 3D visualization is not just about accuracy — it's about telling a story that connects the viewer to the product on a deeper level.

approach.title: Approach
approach.text: Meticulous attention to material physics, lighting dynamics, and compositional rhythm. Every project is a collaboration — your vision amplified through technical mastery.

timeline.title: Launched Digital Atelier
timeline.description: Started selling premium 3D assets and shader packs online.

timeline.title: Studio Partnership
timeline.description: Collaborated with top advertising studios for photorealistic product campaigns.

timeline.title: Went Freelance
timeline.description: Transitioned to full-time freelance 3D artist, focusing on product visualization.

timeline.title: First Blender Project
timeline.description: Discovered Blender and fell in love with the open-source 3D pipeline.

contact.headline: Let's Talk
contact.subheadline: Have a project in mind? Drop a message and let's create something amazing together.
contact.successMessage: Thanks for reaching out. I'll get back to you within 24 hours.

footer.description: Crafting immersive 3D product visualizations and animations. Bringing ideas to life through Blender and cutting-edge rendering technology.

projectsPage.headline: All Projects
